description:
You are an MLOps engineer who must quickly verify that all experiment artifacts produced by two
  separate nodes in a distributed training job have been copied intact to a shared directory.

  Current directory layout
  └── /home/user/distr_exp/run_42/
      ├── node01/
      │   ├── model.bin
      │   └── metrics.json
      └── node02/
          ├── model.bin
          └── metrics.json

  Your goal
  1. Generate a manifest file named
         /home/user/distr_exp/run_42/manifest.sha1
     containing one line per artifact.
  2. Each line must have the following EXACT format (pay attention to spacing):
         <relative path>␣<lower-case 40-char SHA-1 hex hash>
     Example (illustrative only):
         node01/model.bin  e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4
  3. “Relative path” means path relative to /home/user/distr_exp/run_42, using forward slashes.
  4. Lines must be sorted in pure ASCII order by their relative paths.
  5. The file must end with a single trailing newline.
  6. After creating the manifest, print exactly this confirmation line to STDOUT:
         Manifest generated at /home/user/distr_exp/run_42/manifest.sha1

  Constraint
  • Accomplish everything with ONE shell command (pipelines or command-grouping are allowed, but it
    must be issued as a single line).

  The automated test will:
  • Re-calculate each SHA-1 sum.
  • Verify that /home/user/distr_exp/run_42/manifest.sha1 exists, has the correct content, and that
    the confirmation line is printed to STDOUT verbatim.
truth:
Initial filesystem state created for the agent:
  /home/user/distr_exp/run_42/node01/model.bin       (empty regular file, 0 bytes)
  /home/user/distr_exp/run_42/node01/metrics.json    (empty regular file, 0 bytes)
  /home/user/distr_exp/run_42/node02/model.bin       (empty regular file, 0 bytes)
  /home/user/distr_exp/run_42/node02/metrics.json    (empty regular file, 0 bytes)

  Because they are empty, the correct SHA-1 hash for every file is:
      da39a3ee5e6b4b0d3255bfef95601890afd80709

  Therefore the EXACT required content of /home/user/distr_exp/run_42/manifest.sha1 is:

      node01/metrics.json da39a3ee5e6b4b0d3255bfef95601890afd80709
      node01/model.bin    da39a3ee5e6b4b0d3255bfef95601890afd80709
      node02/metrics.json da39a3ee5e6b4b0d3255bfef95601890afd80709
      node02/model.bin    da39a3ee5e6b4b0d3255bfef95601890afd80709
      ⏎ (single trailing newline)

  Note: between the columns is a SINGLE ASCII space, no tabs.

  The automated checker will:
  1. Capture STDOUT; expect the single line
         Manifest generated at /home/user/distr_exp/run_42/manifest.sha1
  2. Read /home/user/distr_exp/run_42/manifest.sha1
     • Verify exactly four lines plus trailing newline
     • Verify alphabetical order
     • Verify hashes match those above
name: task_000000_7b8d080b
